hypothesis: Extending ASTRA to systems with three metastable states by composing conditional scores to enforce equal density across all three states and performing SAA with an ascent direction given by the leading eigenvector of the covariance of pairwise score differences will yield samples whose committor vectors satisfy ||q−(1/3,1/3,1/3)||2<0.1 at least twice as often as sequential pairwise ASTRA, indicating successful targeting of branching transition states.
